app.name: NoorLocator
app.tagline: Connecting you to Shia centers and majalis worldwide
app.attribution: Driven by Mowkab Khoddam Ahlulbayt (AS), Copenhagen, Denmark.
auth.name.label: Name
auth.email.label: Email
auth.password.label: Password
auth.newPassword.label: New password
auth.confirmPassword.label: Confirm password
home.hero.title: Find Shia centers and majalis near you
home.hero.description: NoorLocator helps followers of Ahlulbayt (AS) discover nearby centers, stay aware of majalis, and connect with their community through trusted, location-aware information.
home.status.connecting: Connecting to the live NoorLocator directory...
home.stats.directoryBody: Published centers currently available in NoorLocator.
home.stats.manifestoBody: No follower of Ahlulbayt (AS) should feel disconnected from their community, no matter where they are in the world.
home.mission.title: A mission built around connection, trust, and service
home.mission.description: NoorLocator connects people to the nearest Shia centers, enables centers to communicate their activities, and empowers community contributions with moderation that protects authenticity.
home.mission.highlight: This is not just a directory. It is a living, community-driven ecosystem for connection, knowledge, and service.
home.features.title: Key platform strengths
home.features.description: The public experience is shaped by manifesto-driven priorities that keep NoorLocator clear, useful, and community-first.
home.feature.location.title: Location-based discovery
home.feature.location.description: Surface the nearest centers and most relevant local community opportunities first.
home.feature.languages.title: Multi-language majalis
home.feature.languages.description: Support diaspora communities through structured language data for centers and majalis.
home.feature.community.title: Community-driven platform
home.feature.community.description: Enable community contributions while preserving trust through moderation and clearly defined roles.
home.purpose.title: Built for clarity, trust, and global connection.
home.purpose.description: NoorLocator keeps the experience simple on purpose so guests, contributors, managers, and admins can all understand why the platform exists and how it protects authenticity.
home.identity.vision.title: Vision
home.identity.vision.description: No follower of Ahlulbayt (AS) should feel disconnected from their community.
home.identity.trust.title: Trust
home.identity.trust.description: Moderation exists to protect the accuracy and authenticity of public religious community information.
home.identity.language.title: Language
home.identity.language.description: Structured language support helps diaspora communities discover accessible centers and majalis.
home.preview.title: Preview recently published centers.
home.preview.description: The cards below highlight centers currently available in the NoorLocator directory.
about.hero.title: About NoorLocator
about.hero.description: Learn how NoorLocator supports connection, trust, and service for communities worldwide.
about.vision.title: Vision
about.vision.description: NoorLocator is built on a simple but powerful idea: no follower of Ahlulbayt (AS) should feel disconnected from their community, no matter where they are in the world.
about.vision.highlight: The platform focuses on global accessibility, location relevance, and stronger community connection across Europe and beyond.
about.problem.title: Problem statement
about.problem.description: The manifesto identifies recurring challenges that NoorLocator exists to solve.
about.problem.item1: Finding nearby Shia centers can be difficult when community spaces are scattered or not clearly visible online.
about.problem.item2: People often lack timely awareness of majalis, gatherings, and center activities in their area.
about.problem.item3: Language barriers make it harder for diaspora communities to access events and feel fully connected.
about.mission.title: Mission
about.mission.description: NoorLocator exists to connect, inform, and empower people through trusted community infrastructure.
about.mission.item1: Connect users to the nearest Shia centers.
about.mission.item2: Enable centers to communicate their activities and public information clearly.
about.mission.item3: Empower community contributions with moderation that protects authenticity and accuracy.
about.principles.title: Core principles
about.principles.description: The product experience and system rules are intentionally shaped by the manifesto.
about.principles.trust.title: Trust and authenticity
about.principles.trust.description: Public center data is moderated because religious community information must be accurate, verified, and safe to trust.
about.principles.community.title: Community-driven, admin-controlled
about.principles.community.description: Users contribute, admins validate, and managers maintain center content so the platform can grow without misinformation.
about.principles.language.title: Multi-language accessibility
about.principles.language.description: Structured language support reflects the diversity of diaspora communities and helps non-Arabic speakers find meaningful access.
about.principles.location.title: Location relevance
about.principles.location.description: Nearest centers, accessible languages, and relevant events should appear where they matter most to the user.
about.identity.title: Who we are
about.identity.description: NoorLocator is proudly initiated and driven by Mowkab Khoddam Ahlulbayt (AS), Copenhagen, Denmark.
about.identity.highlight: The platform is designed as service to the community, not simply as software.
about.closing.title: Closing
about.closing.description: NoorLocator is built with the intention of service so people can find remembrance, attend majalis, and stay connected to Ahlulbayt (AS).
about.closing.highlight: Wherever someone lives in the world, NoorLocator aims to ensure they are never far from their community.

centers.hero.description: Browse all approved centers, request nearby results from your browser location, or filter by city, country, and supported language.

login.hero.title: Sign in to NoorLocator
login.hero.description: Sign in with your NoorLocator account to access contribution workflows, assigned manager tools, and the admin moderation panel based on your role.
login.brand.tagline: Sign in to the live NoorLocator network for trusted discovery, contribution, and moderation workflows.
login.verify.description: Verify your email to unlock NoorLocator, then sign in again.
register.hero.title: Create your NoorLocator account
register.hero.description: Create an account to submit center requests, suggest improvements, request manager access, and participate in the NoorLocator community.
register.brand.tagline: Create a NoorLocator account to join the community directory, contribution, and center-management workflows.
register.hint: Use an email address you can access. NoorLocator will email a verification link before trusted features are unlocked.
verify.hero.title: Check your inbox
verify.hero.description: Open the verification email from NoorLocator and follow the secure link to confirm that you own this address.
verify.brand.tagline: Email verification confirms ownership before NoorLocator unlocks trusted features and email notifications.
forgot.hero.title: Reset your NoorLocator password
forgot.hero.description: Enter your email address and NoorLocator will send a secure reset link if the account exists.
reset.hero.title: Set your new NoorLocator password
reset.hero.description: Use the secure reset link from your email to choose a new password.
notifications.gate.title: Loading your NoorLocator notifications.
notifications.gate.description: Your account notifications stay protected until NoorLocator confirms the current authenticated session.
notifications.hero.title: Stay up to date with center activity.
notifications.hero.description: Majlis and event updates appear here as soon as NoorLocator sends them to your account.
notifications.brand.tagline: Your unread badge updates as soon as NoorLocator records new center activity for you.
profile.gate.title: Loading your NoorLocator profile.
profile.gate.description: Your account details stay protected until NoorLocator confirms the current authenticated session.

profile.brand.tagline: Your personal account details stay connected to the same NoorLocator identity and session experience.

dashboard.hero.title: Contribute to NoorLocator through moderated workflows.
